sources.title: He Never Came Home | The Nothing Man | Hollywood War Drama Movie | Full Free 2024 Movie
sources.description:
An Afghanistan war veteran exhibiting odd behavior prompts a friend to secretly reach out to his old army buddy, who harbors a dark secret from their war days.

metadata.Plot: After finding out his job is going to be outsourced, John Cleary, decides to rally his men and fight. This depression era drama shows the lengths a man will go for his family and the America he was promised.
metadata.Actors: Brian T. Baker, John Crann, Brittany Crowell, Arielle Ditkowich
